chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Misc. Application No.S-631 of 2022 (Qurban Ali Vs. SSP Sukkur & others) DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For hearing of main case. 12-01-2024. Mr. Mushtaque Ahmed Shahani, advocate for the applicant. Mr. Shafi Muhammad Mahar, Deputy Prosecutor General. ******** It was alleged by the applicant that a cheque was issued in his favour by the proposed accused dishonestly, it was bounced by the concerned Bank, when was presented there for encashment. By making such allegation, he sought for direction against the police to record his FIR, it was declined by learned Vth Additional Sessions Judge/Ex- Officio Justice of Peace, Sukkur vide order dated 18-11-2022, which is impugned by the applicant before this Court. If for the sake of argument, it is believed that the incident as alleged by the applicant has taken place and for that his FIR is not being recorded, then he could prove the same adequately by having a recourse u/s 200 Cr.P.C. No illegally even otherwise is noticed in the impugned order, which may justify this Court to make interference with the same by way of instant Crl. Misc. Application 561-A Cr.P.C, it is dismissed accordingly. JUDGE Nasim/P.A
